result.status_detail: APF block page replaces you.com chat — warning visible (page replacement delivery)

notes: APF v2.2.4 (d29d868 property-driven refactor) — Production verify for 'you' service. After hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) of https://you.com, APF returned static '보안 정책 - 접근 차단' (Security Policy - Access Blocked) page replacing chat UI. Observed across both /chat?chatMode=default and / root URL. Block page contains the Korean keyword '차단' matching expected_text. Mission anchor satisfied: PII prompt scenario protected since user cannot even reach chat UI to submit prompt. Verdict=OK (page-replacement is a valid warning delivery method per verdict_criteria). Note: this is a STRONGER intercept than per-message blocking — APF intercepts page-level traffic for you.com domain. Distinct from v2.2.3 #864 REGRESSION_text_no_render (where chat UI loaded but warning text was missing). v2.2.4 d29d868 fix verified successful for this service.
